prompt: Our metrics exporter keeps shipping count=1 for metrics that two handlers definitely both reported. It only ever happens right after a deploy introduces a new metric name — the very first datapoints, one of them just evaporates. From then on the metric behaves perfectly, and I can hammer it from a single thread all day without losing anything. stats_registry.py is tiny and it even takes a lock, so I'm stumped. Repro: python3 test_stats_registry.py. Fix the registry so the test passes and leave test_stats_registry.py exactly as it is.
